ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "business_name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the business */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the business */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the business */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the business is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the business is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the business */,
  "business_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of business (e.g., dispensary, delivery service) */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Cannabis license number */,
  "license_expiration_date" TEXT /* Cannabis license expiration date */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the business */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the business was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the business was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_business_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_type_id") REFERENCES business_types ("business_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_types" (
  "business_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business type */,
  "business_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the business type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., business owner, customer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business where the order was placed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Address where the order was delivered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price of a single unit of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business selling the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "inventory_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image of the product */,
  "thc_percentage" REAL /* THC percentage of the product */,
  "cbd_percentage" REAL /* CBD percentage of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being rated */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being rated (optional if rating the business) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating score (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., product, business) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
